title: MD
biography: Peter Hotez is an American vaccine scientist who co-developed CORBEVAX, a patent-free COVID-19 vaccine used across the developing world, and leads development of vaccines for neglected tropical diseases. He is dean of the National School of Tropical Medicine at Baylor College of Medicine and a leading advocate against vaccine misinformation.
aiSummary: Peter Hotez is a tropical medicine and vaccinology specialist with an H-index of 105 at Baylor College of Medicine. Co-developed patent-free CORBEVAX COVID vaccine and hookworm vaccine. Based in Houston, United States.

affiliations.role: Dean, National School of Tropical Medicine
